title: Break and Continue 🛑⏭️
description: Take control of the loop flow.

slides.title: Loop Hacks 🎮
slides.content:
`break` stops the entire loop immediately.

`continue` skips the rest of the current loop step and starts the next iteration immediately.

slides.title: Using Break

quizData.question: What keyword skips the current iteration and forces the loop to proceed to the next iteration?
quizData.explanation: The `continue` keyword jumps to the next iteration of the loop.
